hero_subtitle: SFTY Business connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into one operational workflow to route enhanced due diligence cases efficiently with full audit and compliance traceability.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Risk-based onboarding depends on manual routing
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and inconsistencies when enhanced due diligence cases are routed manually across disconnected systems. This creates audit gaps and slows decision-making for VASPs managing complex KYC and KYB onboarding workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider outputs, risk assessments and regulatory triggers into one structured workflow that automates routing, captures review actions and preserves audit evidence for onboarding teams.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to EDD review
workflow_description: SFTY routes onboarding and KYC/KYB provider outputs into risk-based workflows that escalate enhanced due diligence cases for structured review and audit evidence preservation.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms disconnected KYC and KYB outputs into structured risk-based routing, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence to support clear, defensible onboarding workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs by structuring risk-based routing, preserving audit-ready evidence, and enabling deployment controls for consistent onboarding and bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how EDD cases are routed to compliance teams
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how onboarding evidence supports audit-ready decision logs

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects KYC, KYB, screening, and risk signals into structured workflows, helping compliance teams manage onboarding, decisions, cases and audit trails in a connected compliance operating layer.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage EDD routing workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes enhanced due diligence cases by applying internal risk rules and policies, automatically escalating selected cases into review workflows with assigned tasks and audit logging.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding evidence by storing provider outputs, decision logs, reviewer notes and supporting documents within secure, reviewable cases for audit readiness and regulatory inspection support.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY works above existing KYC and KYB providers, connecting their outputs into one platform without replacing them, enabling policy-driven orchestration and consolidated risk review.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace onboarding or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace onboarding or KYB providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, decision records and evidence packages to support compliance teams efficiently.
final_title: Structure enhanced due diligence routing workflows
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into controlled onboarding cases with audit trails and compliance governance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
